summary: Comprehensive end-to-end testing of Pineapple OS modular operator workspace completed successfully. All 7 modules tested including backend APIs and frontend UI integration.

design_issues.issue: Missing Description or aria-describedby attributes for accessibility

passed_tests: Commands CRUD operations with entry types and tags
Tasks CRUD with status/priority filters and search
Deals CRUD with auto-calculated profit/ROI (verified calculations)
Knowledge Vault CRUD with categories and search
Build Queue CRUD with status progression
Daily Review timeline and reflections save
Dashboard aggregation with all counts and activity feed
Daily review reflections and next actions save
All form dialogs open and close properly
